title: branch — settings
description: Tenant-scoped policy for branch provisioning + geocoding + hours enforcement + capacity + closure notifications. Compliance floors clamp every value where they apply (e.g. minimum notification lead time on closure is set by regional labor-notice law).

groups.label: Branches
groups.description: Tenant-wide policy for branch provisioning + operational-hours enforcement + geocoding preferences.

sections.label: Provisioning defaults
sections.description: Defaults applied when a new Branch is created.

fields.name: seed_default_on_organization_create
fields.label: Auto-create a default branch with each organization
fields.helpText: When on, creating a new Organization automatically provisions a default Branch under it. Off by default — most tenants want explicit control.

sections.label: Geocoding
sections.description: Automatic address→coordinates via a mapping subprocessor. Requires the geocoding entitlement.

fields.name: geocoding_quality_threshold
fields.label: Minimum confidence to accept a geocoded match
fields.helpText: Below this, the result is refused + coordinates stay at their prior value.

fields.name: auto_regeocode_on_address_change
fields.label: Automatically re-geocode when address changes
fields.helpText: Off = address edits do not touch coordinates unless the admin explicitly triggers a re-geocode.

fields.name: enforce_operating_hours
fields.label: Refuse bookings outside opening hours
fields.helpText: When on, booking-adjacent write routes refuse with 403 outside the branch's opening_hours + exceptions.

fields.name: capacity_gating_enabled
fields.label: Enforce capacity on bookings
fields.helpText: When on, booking-adjacent routes refuse when the branch's fire-safety cap would be exceeded. Off = capacity is display-only.

sections.label: Closure notifications
sections.description: Who gets notified when a branch closes.

fields.name: notify_all_staff_on_closure
fields.label: Notify every staff member assigned to the branch

fields.name: closure_notice_days
fields.label: Minimum days between closure decision and closed_date
fields.helpText: Regional labor-notice laws may force this higher. When the value is 0, closure is immediate.
